News Clips

Courier Newsroom spent big on a Meta ad blitz in October

Columbia Journalism Review


I pulled the data and crafted each visualization for this piece with additional writing, editing and reporting. Combined, the progressive “newsroom”’s over $6 million ad spend on Meta was second only to the Trump and Harris official campaigns.

Overdose Prevention Centers Generate Hostility in East Harlem, Muted Response in Washington Heights

The Uptowner


In the three years since OnPoint NYC opened safe injection sites, why did its clinic in East Harlem become the center of controversy?

Chronic Absenteeism Remains High in Harlem Elementary Schools

The Uptowner


Over half of Harlem elementary schoolers are chronically absent, which can imperil students’ futures, experts warn.

Police Follow as Group Holds Peace Walk for Black August in Harlem

The Uptowner


The Harlem/Palestine Peace Walk had over 30 demonstrators march through the streets of Harlem with a small police presence following closely behind.
